User-agent: *
Allow: /

# Block old blog and work content
Disallow: /blog/
Disallow: /tags/
Disallow: /2022-*/
Disallow: /work/

# Important pages
Allow: /about/
Allow: /case-studies/
Allow: /contact/

# Sitemap location
Sitemap: https://sdw.solutions/sitemap.xml

# Crawl-delay (be nice to servers)
Crawl-delay: 1
